modification_notice: Extracted complete Simplified Chinese sentences from the checksum-pinned OSHA PDF, excluded URLs, phone instructions, page furniture, images, logos, photo credits, and other third-party content, and added input-only provenance; no expected text or converter output was used.
known_biases: Official U.S. disaster-cleanup guidance is not representative of ordinary Taiwan traffic.
Construction, electrical, medical, and workplace-safety terminology is intentionally concentrated.
Multi-column PDF tables and inline headings require input-only eligibility review.
Photo credits, images, logos, and external or third-party content are excluded.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
